[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content performance, link building, and upcoming marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/JScpEu5MQXzjA7NEFsY5BihLJzd2-huS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
